scripts.electron:dev: concurrently -n vite,electron "cross-env VITE_APP_INSTANCE=student vite" "wait-on http://localhost:5173 && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://localhost:5173 electron ."
scripts.electron:dev:admin: concurrently -n vite,electron "cross-env VITE_APP_INSTANCE=admin vite" "wait-on http://localhost:5173 && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://localhost:5173 electron ."
scripts.build:exe:student: npm run build:student && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --config electron-builder.student.json
scripts.build:exe:admin: npm run build:admin && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --config electron-builder.admin.json
